APP_BASE.description: Monorepo subdirectory containing the server (Procfile, package.json)

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for JWT token signing

PORTONE_API_SECRET.description: PortOne V2 API secret for payment verification

BANK_ACCOUNT_BANK.description: Bank name shown for bank transfer orders

BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.description: Bank account number for bank transfer orders

BANK_ACCOUNT_HOLDER.description: Bank account holder name for bank transfer orders

SOLAPI_API_KEY.description: SOLAPI API key for SMS notifications

SOLAPI_API_SECRET.description: SOLAPI API secret for SMS notifications
